name: Potato Latkes from Joel Erlich
recipeInstructions:
1. After grating the potatoes, place them in a cloth towel and wring out to remove as much moisture as possible.
2. Place the potatoes in a bowl and blend thoroughly with the eggs.
3. Combine the flour and salt, then sift into the potato mixture along with the grated onion.
4. Heat at least 1 teaspoon of oil in a large skillet.
5. Add the potato mixture to the skillet and cook until browned on one side.
6. Flip the latkes and cook until all sides are crisp.
Drain on a paper towel.
